target.transportPath: All seven mandatory client rows plus the CDPD WDP-over-UDP/IP bearer alternative WDP-CT-C-002 and IPv4 addressing alternative WDP-NA-C-003.

selectedExternalDependencies.note: The citation is retained in the external dependency open-review queue and requires an authoritative metadata/license record.

governingSource.selectedDefinition: MCF = all mandatory client features of the specification SCR
governingSource.dependencyGrammar: SCR requirement expressions use AND/OR with AND taking precedence

authority.extractionMethod: Row identifiers, first-line feature labels, status, actor, order, and dependency expressions were parsed from the hash-locked effective SCR table text. Private PDFs and full text remain outside Git.

obligations.dependencyExpression: WDP-CORE-C-001 AND WDP-NA-C-000 AND (WDP-ANSI-C-000 OR WDP-CDMA-C-000 OR WDP-CT-C-002 OR WDP-CT-C-006 OR WDP-CT-C-008 OR WDP-DECT-C-000 OR WDP-FLEX-C-001 OR WDP-FLEX-C-002 OR WDP-GSM-C-000 OR WDP-PDC-C-000 OR WDP-MOBITEX-C-000 OR WDP-TETRA-C-000)

mapping.assessmentNote: A WDP datagram/UDP path exists, but no historical bearer alternative is capability-selected and proven against the WAP-200 dependency closure.

testEvidence.limitation: Synthetic transport evidence; does not close the WAP-200 bearer/address dependency choice.

obligations.dependencyExpression: WDP-CORE-S-001 AND WDP-NA-S-000 AND (WDP-ANSI-S-000 OR WDP-CDMA-S-000 OR WDP-CT-S-002 OR WDP-CT-S-006 OR WDP-CT-S-008 OR WDP-DECT-S-000 OR WDP-FLEX-S-001 OR WDP-FLEX-S-002 OR WDP-GSM-S-000 OR WDP-PDC-S-000 OR WDP-MOBITEX-S-000 OR WDP-TETRA-S-000)

mapping.assessmentNote: Preserved for source completeness; implementation is assessed when its optional, server, bearer, or alternate-mode capability is selected.

obligations.dependencyExpression: WDP-PF-C-001 AND WDP-PF-C-002 AND WDP-NA-C-006 AND WDP-NA-C-007

mapping.assessmentNote: The Rust datagram model composes send/receive and address/port fields, but the complete WAP-200 abstract-service contract lacks source-derived fixtures.

testEvidence.limitation: Synthetic transport evidence; does not close the WAP-200 bearer/address dependency choice.

obligations.dependencyExpression: WDP-PF-S-001 AND WDP-PF-S-002 AND WDP-NA-S-006 AND WDP-NA-S-007

mapping.assessmentNote: Preserved for source completeness; implementation is assessed when its optional, server, bearer, or alternate-mode capability is selected.
Send/receive operations exist behind DatagramTransport, but exact T-DUnitdata primitive semantics and error boundaries are not tested from WAP-200 vectors.

testEvidence.limitation: Synthetic UDP round trip; not a source-derived T-DUnitdata request vector.

mapping.assessmentNote: Send/receive operations exist behind DatagramTransport, but exact T-DUnitdata primitive semantics and error boundaries are not tested from WAP-200 vectors.
